creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Hi all, I'm the port maintainer for graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.

The perl Image::ExifTool module version history is described here:
https://exiftool.org/history.html

As you can see, periodically, certain version of exiftool are designated as "production versions".

The graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool port tracks the current production version of exiftool, which at this moment is version 12.00.

For non-production versions, please use the graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel port which is used to track off-cycle releases.

For this reason I do not approve the patch to 12.12 for graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool.

Thank you!
